chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitution Petition No. D- 2019 of 2025. ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order of office objection No. 1 to 5. 2. For order on Misc. No. 9910/2025 (Exemption) 3. For order on Misc. No. 9911/2025 (Stay) 4. For hearing of main case. 07.11.2025 Mr. Muhammad Ali Lakhani, advocate for the petitioner. Under instructions learned counsel wants to withdraw this petition unconditionally. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Ayaz p.s.
